title: Bitdeer Technologies Group Analyst Ratings and Consensus
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) maintains a consensus rating of Strong Buy based on analyst coverage. The stock has a consensus price target of $23.57 based on ratings from 15 analysts. Recent analyst activity shows mixed signals: Cantor Fitzgerald downgraded BTDR to Neutral from Overweight, reducing the price target from $20 to $10 on February 27, 2026. Keefe, Bruyette & Woods also downgraded the stock on January 27, 2026, cutting the price target from $26.5 to $14. However, Needham analyst John Todaro maintained a Buy rating with a $30 price target, while Rosenblatt maintained a buy rating. Despite recent downgrades, the overall consensus remains bullish on Bitdeer's long-term prospects, driven by expectations for Bitcoin mining expansion and AI infrastructure development. The wide dispersion in analyst views reflects significant uncertainty regarding the cryptocurrency mining sector and Bitcoin price trajectory.
